proof_boundary: This artifact proves the cancellation-bearing epsilon-eleven through epsilon-fourteen partition coefficient bounds and normalized potential-jet caps needed for the finite central residual. It does not yet compose the Bell and potential remainders, prove the exact cumulant corridors, curvature ray, order-four entry, PF-infinity, RH, or Lambda<=0.
remaining_target: Use the four partition coefficient caps, the finite normalized-jet caps, and a cancellation-preserving epsilon-fifteen remainder to close the sole central unit-disk partition residual.

rows.claim: The exact graded exponential and Gaussian tilted-moment recurrences extend the partition through epsilon fourteen.
Centered Arb Taylor enclosures preserve the partition cancellations on every finite mode block.
The epsilon-eleven partition coefficient has unit-disk coefficient norm below two.
The next three cancellation-bearing partition coefficients obey fixed unit-disk norm caps.
The same finite Taylor cover bounds the normalized potential jets through order sixteen.
A companion collar cover bounds the normalized seventeenth potential derivative.
rows.proof_boundary: Shifted normalized jet only; central normalization transfer is separate.

rows.claim: Exact coefficient norms record the four added formal-density polynomials for tail accounting.
Compose these cancellation-bearing coefficients with the epsilon-fifteen Bell remainder and exact potential Taylor remainder.
rows.proof_boundary: Open composition target; no exact cumulant corridor is asserted here.

status: rigorous finite partition extension and high-jet theorem
